creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 208793
Update to 5.40.3

Simple update to 5.43.0
Changelog:
Added virtual rooms, which give the possibility for the user to specify more rooms for an activity, or to choose between a large room or more smaller rooms for an activity, and might open the possibilities for other kinds of usage. Suggested by math on the forum, who had some very useful ideas. 
Various rare but important bug fixes concerning the new feature of virtual rooms.
Small memory leak bug fixed (when reading incorrect files with virtual rooms).
Minor fixes and improvements.
Added a new example file from Greece, by dimzev.
